## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior QA Engineer with 10+ years of experience in HRIS, payroll, and financial systems, with deep hands-on expertise in mainframe testing and COBOL-based credit card platforms. Strong background in manual, functional, regression, and system testing across enterprise environments. Skilled in translating business requirements into clear test cases, validating complex workflows, and ensuring data accuracy using SQL. ISTQB-certified, with experience in PHP automation, structured QA processes, and cross-team collaboration across full SDLC.

*Jan 2022 - Apr 2026*
* Reviewed business requirements and turned them into actionable test cases.

* Communicated risks, defects, and test progress during planning and execution phases.
* **Mainframe & COBOL-Focused Work:** Tested mainframe-based Banking systems, including payments and transactions. Executed end-to-end testing on legacy mainframe components, ensuring accuracy, stability, and compliance.

### Software Engineering Analyst | Accenture

* Performed performance and middleware testing across web and backend systems.
* Provided Tier-1 support for HP ALM and HP LoadRunner.
